items.name: accelera
items.description: Accelera is a cutting-edge ML pipeline framework . It provides a robust, scalable solution for building and deploying machine learning workflows with optimized performance.

items.name: transformers
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: leo-cdp-framework
items.description: LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: Electricity-Peak-Demand-Prediction-AEP-
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework to predict peak electricity demand at daily and hourly levels using load and weather data. Built Random Forest models to identify peak periods, handled class imbalance, and evaluated performance with ROC-AUC and F1-score. Deployed via a Streamlit dashboard for forecasting and grid support.

items.name: Ignis
items.description: 🔥 Ignite your local AI projects with Ignis, a tool designed for seamless implementation and efficient management of machine learning models.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: NumCompute
items.description: An extended package with building a decision tree–based machine learning framework that supports both

items.name: Altfit
items.description: Altfit is an advanced movement analysis framework powered by machine learning. It utilizes TensorFlow Lite models to process motion-related data, enabling applications in fitness tracking, rehabilitation, sports performance optimization, and biomechanical assessments.

items.name: FDRS-digit-randomness-screening
items.description: A statistical and machine-learning framework for screening non-random digit patterns in raw numerical data from biomedical research.

items.name: Autoshield---Adaptive-Multi-Layered-Defence-for-Real-Time-DDoS-Mitigation
items.description: Autoshield is a multi-layered DDoS defense framework designed to detect and mitigate attacks across L3, L4, and L7 layers using Machine Learning. The system achieved 95%+ threat detection accuracy, reduced response time by 40%, and ensured 99.9% service availability through real-time traffic monitoring and anomaly detection.

items.name: Machine-Learning
items.description: A progressive repository dedicated to exploring Machine Learning. This project is updated continuously with source code, datasets, notebook tutorials, and framework implementations as I build them.

items.name: eeg_emg_fusion_ml
items.description: The aim of this research is to develop and evaluate a machine-learning framework that integrates electroencephalography (EEG) and electromyography (EMG) signals to improve the recognition and prediction of upper-limb gestures

items.name: w5-football-prediction
items.description: ⚽ Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.

items.description: 🚦 Predict traffic accident severity using advanced machine learning and explainable AI, enhancing road safety with clear insights from comprehensive data analysis.

items.description: vnpy-Machine-Learning: integrates machine-learning models with the vn.py quantitative-trading framework for AI-driven, data-driven algorithmic trading and backtesting in Python.

items.name: An-Explainable-AI-Framework-for-Financial-Health-Scoring-and-Risk-Intelligence
items.description: This project develops an Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) framework for assessing financial health and predicting financial risk using machine learning techniques. The system analyzes financial indicators, performs data preprocessing and feature engineering, and generates interpretable risk scores to support data-driven decision-making.

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: Neural-Network-From-Scratch-Python
items.description: A custom neural network built from scratch using Python without external machine learning frameworks. Includes forward propagation, backpropagation, training logic, and basic AI concepts implementation.

items.name: Detection-and-Mitigation-of-Botnet-DDoS-attack
items.description: An end-to-end network security framework implementing Machine Learning ensembles (Random Forest + CNN) alongside Recurrent Bat Optimization (RNN) and Game Theory models to accurately detect botnets and dynamically mitigate real-time DDoS attacks on IoT infrastructure.

items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: Learning-Food-Affordability-Representations-to-Predict-Obesity-Diabetes-and-Healthcare-Costs-in-US
items.description: A data-driven ML framework analyzing food affordability across ~3,100 U.S. counties to predict obesity, diabetes, and Medicare costs. Combines autoencoders, PCA, XGBoost, and Double Machine Learning (DML) causal inference via EconML. Identifies a $3.50/meal policy tipping point with simulated savings in billions across 65M Medicare beneficiaries.

items.description: SepsisSentinel: An advanced clinical data science and machine learning framework for the early detection and forecasting of sepsis utilizing clinical datasets. Built with scalable data pipelines and predictive modeling.

items.description: MiniML is a lightweight Machine and Deep Learning framework dedicated to training neural networks in embedded systems, redefining conventional and heavyweight models into different methods that can be exported and executed on low-cost microcontrollers (Arduino, ESP32, STM32).

items.name: system-emulator
items.description: A comprehensive framework for modeling complex systems, executing sandboxed operations, machine learning predictions, and optimizing multi-agent objectives.

items.name: urban-infrastructure-satelite-imagery
items.description: This project presents a machine learning framework for extracting urban infrastructure information from high-resolution satellite imagery. The objective is to automatically classify road and building pixels using feature engineering and supervised machine learning techniques.

items.name: Predicting_Gold_Movement
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework to predict short-term gold price movements by combining SPDR Gold Shares (GLD) historical market data with news sentiment features. Extracted and analyzed large-scale financial news signals to evaluate their impact on predictive performance and market trends.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: Supervised-Machine-Learning
items.description: This repository contains an end-to-end Machine Learning classification framework designed to analyze whether an individual has developed an Imaginary Companion (IC) based on their self-reported psychometric and psychological health scores.

items.description: A temporal state-aware machine learning framework for customer behavioural state transition prediction, purchase propensity modelling, and marketing analytics using Olist and UCI Online Retail datasets.

items.name: student-success-ai-framework
items.description: Machine learning and deep learning framework for predicting student persistence and academic success using the Open University Learning Analytics Dataset (OULAD), with future applications to STEM retention, early-alert systems, and NSF SPARC6 student success initiatives.

items.description: Causal Machine Learning Framework for Cognitive Load Assessment

items.description: An end-to-end analytics framework for retail credit decisioning that balances risk and profitability. It combines machine learning, financial metrics, and policy simulation to maximize expected portfolio value under risk constraints, reflecting real-world challenges faced by senior banking analytics teams.

items.description: Code for "An Intelligent Predictive Maintenance Framework Using Machine Learning for Smart Manufacturing Environments" – LSTM autoencoder, 1D-CNN with attention, and LSTM-XGBoost for RUL prediction (C-MAPSS FD001).

items.description: Master Thesis 2026: Security and Robustness of Automated Credit Decision Algorithms. This repository contains the complete implementation of machine learning-based credit scoring systems, adversarial attack simulations, robustness metrics, defense mechanisms, and evaluation framework developed at Aalborg University.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-Multi-Classifier-System-for-Antibiotic-Resistance-Prediction
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework for antibiotic resistance gene classification using transformer-based DNA embeddings, feature selection, and predictive modeling. The system supports real-time ARG detection through a Streamlit web application.

items.name: VMDragonSlayer
items.description: Automated multi-engine framework for unpacking, analyzing, and devirtualizing binaries protected by commercial and custom Virtual Machine based protectors. Combines Dynamic Taint Tracking, Symbolic Execution, Pattern & Semantic Classification, and Machine Learning–driven prioritization to dramatically reduce manual reverse engineering time.

items.name: ML_Driven_TalentIdentification_In_Youth_Chess
items.description: The purpose of this study is to develop and evaluate a machine-learning-based talent identification framework for Indian youth chess players using FIDE rating history and FIDE rating-calculation data.

This research focuses on parameters like Financial Resources Utilization (FRU), Footprint of Projects, Professional (FPPP), and Intellectual Property Rights (IPR).

items.description: This repository contains an advanced financial data analytics framework that implements predictive modeling and unsupervised machine learning algorithms on global equities.

items.name: nickel_indonesia
items.description: NLP analysis of 2,700+ news articles (2014–2025) examining how conflicts around Chinese investment in Indonesia's nickel sector are framed using the Narrative Policy Framework. Combines manual annotation with machine learning to identify narrative roles (villain/victim/hero) and conflict types

items.name: drift-demo
items.description: drift-demo is a fully self-contained Python framework that simulates, detects, and responds to machine-learning data drift in a streaming environment. In real-world deployments, models trained on historical data gradually degrade in performance as the real-world distribution of inputs and labels shifts over time - a phenomenon called drift

items.name: Malware_Detection
items.description: This project is a web based malware detection system developed using machine learning and the Streamlit framework. It analyzes uploaded files and predicts whether a file is safe or malware using a Random Forest model trained on Windows PE file features for academic demonstration purposes.

items.name: Google-Advance-Data-Analytics-Capstone-Project
items.description: This is an end-to-end data analytics and machine learning capstone project designed to predict employee attrition. Using the PACE framework, the notebook guides the user through cleaning an HR dataset, conducting exploratory data analysis (EDA), and preparing to build predictive models to understand why employees leave

items.name: nnpdf

items.name: IPred-S-1.0
items.description: The IPred-S 1.0 (Inhibitor Predictor for sEH, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting sEH inhibitors.

items.description: An ML-driven framework designed to forecast urban water requirements and assess reservoir storage capacities. Developed by IT students at D.Y. Patil University, this project uses machine learning and sensor data to optimize distribution and combat global water scarcity driven by climate change and urbanization.

items.name: black-box-ranking-audit
items.description: An algorithmic audit framework that combines machine learning surrogate modeling, SHAP explainability, and automated inferential change-point discovery to detect and localize hidden, non-linear penalties within a black-box marketplace ranking engine.

items.name: Explainable-ECG-Cardiac-Risk-COLAB
items.description: A research-driven lightweight Edge-AI framework for early cardiac risk prediction from ECG signals.
